debug_info.goal:
r : backend.serial.u64.field.FieldElement51
h_bounds : ∀ i < 5, ↑r[i]! < 2 ^ 54
⊢ ∃ r',
    invert r = ok r' ∧
      let r_nat := Field51_as_Nat r % p;
      let r'_nat := Field51_as_Nat r' % p;
      (r_nat ≠ 0 → r'_nat * r_nat % p = 1) ∧ (r_nat = 0 → r'_nat = 0) ∧ ∀ i < 5, ↑r'[i]! < 2 ^ 52
